message:
Add jfp to verified installers and regenerate scripts

- Add jfp (JeffreysPrompts CLI) to KNOWN_INSTALLERS in security.sh
- Update checksums.yaml with jfp installer checksum
- Regenerate installer scripts to sync with manifest

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# checksums.yaml - Auto-generated 2026-01-21T15:54:46-05:00
+# checksums.yaml - Auto-generated 2026-01-21T15:55:57-05:00
 # Run: ./scripts/lib/security.sh --update-checksums
 
 installers:
@@ -86,6 +86,10 @@ installers:
     url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.1/install.sh"
     sha256: "abdb525ee9f5b48b34d8ed9fc67c6013fb0f659712e401ecd88ab989b3af8f53"
 
+  jfp:
+    url: "https://jeffreysprompts.com/install-cli.sh"
+    sha256: "97db629240b4065349e63601f05cd483fcec4b1e16008e986d6eed3c3a0367b7"
+
   rust:
     url: "https://sh.rustup.rs"
     sha256: "17247e4bcacf6027ec2e11c79a72c494c9af69ac8d1abcc1b271fa4375a106c2"

@@ -180,13 +180,16 @@ install_agents_codex() {
     log_step "Installing agents.codex"
 
     if [[ "${DRY_RUN:-false}" = "true" ]]; then
-        log_info "dry-run: install: ~/.bun/bin/bun install -g --trust @openai/codex@latest (target_user)"
+        log_info "dry-run: install: if ! ~/.bun/bin/bun install -g --trust @openai/codex@latest; then (target_user)"
     else
         if ! run_as_target_shell <<'INSTALL_AGENTS_CODEX'
-~/.bun/bin/bun install -g --trust @openai/codex@latest
+if ! ~/.bun/bin/bun install -g --trust @openai/codex@latest; then
+  echo "WARN: Codex CLI latest tag install failed; retrying @openai/codex" >&2
+  ~/.bun/bin/bun install -g --trust @openai/codex
+fi
 INSTALL_AGENTS_CODEX
         then
-            log_error "agents.codex: install command failed: ~/.bun/bin/bun install -g --trust @openai/codex@latest"
+            log_error "agents.codex: install command failed: if ! ~/.bun/bin/bun install -g --trust @openai/codex@latest; then"
             return 1
         fi
     fi

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 # ============================================================
 # Data-only manifest index. Safe to source.
 
-ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256="83debc9a5766fca04c262b82cc05f31c492fe90b6a8a505887197c9dde49f871"
+ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256="9bb747cd7da8d6b881e8ac1c5c7b9ec0d5a4ac8109e2e75ae6e84f443c36f68d"
 
 ACFS_MODULES_IN_ORDER=(
   "base.system"
